name: Firefly III
compose:
name: slashnode-firefly-iii
services:
  server:
    image: fireflyiii/core:version-6.6.3
    container_name: firefly-iii-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      APP_KEY: ${secret.APP_FIREFLY_III_APP_KEY}
      DB_HOST: firefly-iii-db
      DB_PORT: '3306'
      DB_CONNECTION: mysql
      DB_DATABASE: fireflyiii
      DB_USERNAME: fireflyiii
      DB_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
    volumes:
      - server_data-upload:/var/www/html/storage/upload
      - server_data-logs:/var/www/html/storage/logs
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:30009:8080
  db:
    image: mariadb:10.9.4
    container_name: firefly-iii-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MYSQL_DATABASE: fireflyiii
      MYSQL_USER: fireflyiii
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
    volumes:
      - db_data-mysql:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-upload:
    name: slashnode-firefly-iii_server_data-upload
  server_data-logs:
    name: slashnode-firefly-iii_server_data-logs
  db_data-mysql:
    name: slashnode-firefly-iii_db_data-mysql
